items.title: Can SRS and GMS Cement Home Depot's Hold on the Pro Market?
items.description: HD's strategic acquisitions of SRS and GMS strengthen contractor relationships, expanding specialty offerings and building a full-service Pro ecosystem.

items.title: Home Depot: How To Find & Own America's Greatest Opportunities
items.description: In 1981, in the middle of a bear market, Home Depot stock had its IPO. Shares quickly grew by more than 1,000%.

items.title: Early Discounts, Late Profits? ETF Investors Eye Retail Winners As Promotions Fizzle
items.description: Early holiday promotions are flopping, says Placer.ai. As retailers brace for a split season, ETF investors weigh luxury versus discount plays.

items.title: Consumer Stocks Are Due for a Catch-Up Rally. This ETF Is Your Way In.
items.description: How to use the Consumer Discretionary Select SPDR ETF to place a bet on the underappreciated strength of consumers.

items.title: Will Adobe's (ADBE) AI Foundry Launch Reshape Its Edge in Enterprise Content Creation?
items.description: Earlier this month, Adobe launched Adobe AI Foundry, an enterprise service enabling businesses to build custom generative AI models using their own branding and intellectual property, with early adoption from companies like Home Depot and Walt Disney Imagineering. This move marks Adobe's deeper entry into enterprise-grade AI, targeting demand for scalable, brand-safe content generation and secure use of proprietary data in creative workflows. We'll explore how Adobe's new AI offering and...
